name: Tom Cotton
subject: I stand alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
We need a president who stands up for America--not one who takes a knee. A strong and proud America is a safe America--safe from our enemies and safe from war. President Trump has maintained peace through strength. He has stood up for America at home and abroad.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzMTY5NzgS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjIyNDUzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

******** "Stands Alone." That was the motto of my old Army unit, the 506th Infantry--the original Band of Brothers. From the Normandy beaches to the Iraqi desert, we fought alongside each other but we were always prepared to stand alone.

And so it is with our nation. We lead the free world. **But we 'll stand alone if we must to defend America.**
**
Donald Trump understands that national security is the Commander in Chief 's highest priority.** He puts America first and he is willing to go it alone if it means protecting our country. That's why we're safer from international threats than we were four years ago.

Joe Biden would return us to a weak and dangerous past. Barack Obama's own secretary of defense said Joe Biden has been wrong on nearly every major national security decision over the past four decades.

**_Just look at his record._**

[**__**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzMTY5NzgS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjIyNDUzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****__****_[**Peter, will you pitch in to stop Joe Biden from becoming Commander in Chief?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzMTY5NzgS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjIyNDUzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We need a president who stands up for America--not one who takes a knee. A strong and proud America is a safe America--safe from our enemies and safe from war.

President Trump has maintained peace through strength. He has stood up for America at home and abroad.

[**Will you pitch in $100, $75, or $50 to stop Joe Biden?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzMTY5NzgS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjIyNDUzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We need leadership that's willing to stand alone for American freedom and security, and never take a knee.
_****_
[Pitch In](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzMTY5NzgS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjIyNDUzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

In Service,

Tom Cotton

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzMTY5NzgS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjIyNDUzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Celebrate Friday Night with a GOTV Rally Friday Night for Senator Ed Markey!
body:
Join Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, and our own, Roza Calderon for the kick-off! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=dac7baf397&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## **KICK-OFF THE WEEKEND OF ACTION THIS FRIDAY NIGHT!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=21a79d25b9&e=66979298f9)
---
| _We are kicking off our Weekend of Action for Senator Ed Markey with an Amazing Roundtable of Progressive Champions!_
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=bd34020843&e=66979298f9 "RSVP HERE")
---
| **Join Ed Markey, Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, and Future Generations PAC Executive Director Roza Calderón for a virtual rally on Zoom to get out the vote for Ed ahead of the Massachusetts primary!**

We'll hear from top progressive champions, and learn about Ed's vision to move us out of this crisis moment, as well as how you can get involved with Get Out the Vote efforts during this critical home stretch.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=fbd091223e&e=66979298f9)
---
[ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d8d38fe457&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| [SIGN UP TO TEXT](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f9ebd5a4e7&e=66979298f9 "SIGN UP TO TEXT")
---
| [SIGN UP TO CALL](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ace7e060c3&e=66979298f9 "SIGN UP TO CALL")
---
| [START MAKING CALLS NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=47c336df3e&e=66979298f9 "START MAKING CALLS NOW!")
---
|
---
|
#### **Senator Ed Markey **is up for re-election and as the co-author of the Green New Deal, he's being challenged.
It's not a secret, Senator Ed Markey placed a huge target on his back the second he co-authored the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. While the nation celebrated such a bold climate and economic proposal, others, like Joe Kennedy III, felt that challenging Senator Markey was the only way to protect his $1.75 million dollars worth of oil stocks with Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Schlumberger.

Needless to say, dark money is pouring into this race fast, and we must fight back. Sign up to make calls to re-elect Ed and give the GND a fair shot!
---
| [TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f90835c84a&e=66979298f9 "TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.** **
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d17055305e&e=66979298f9)
---
| The coronavirus pandemic has really changed the way we do politics. Our organization stretches every penny that is donated to keep our operations going and provide the best support to our amazing candidates. From text banking, door hangers, and safety equipment for our team, we count entirely on grassroots donations because we are powered by the People.

_We are youth-founded, organized, and led. We volunteer all of our time to fight for future generations. We thank you for your support._

**With just one week before the September 1st Massachusetts Primary, can you commit to $15 a month until we win in November?**
---
| [Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b788e1e8dd&e=66979298f9 "Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations")
---
|
---
|
### A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
We've come a long way! When we founded Future Generations we knew it would be difficult to get going in a sea of organizations. But we set out to be different. We set out to support candidates and incumbents who think not just of making a name for themselves with today's hot topics, but those who truly care about the world we are building for Future Generations to come. While you scroll through this email, I'd like you to ask yourself, "What is the legacy we'll leave behind?"

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Trump's speech
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Friend, this isn't us |
---
Friend,

* 180,000 Americans are dead.
* Tens of millions have lost their jobs.
* Emergency unemployment insurance has run out.
* Emergency small business loans have stopped.
* Banks and landlords are threatening foreclosure and eviction.
**And it all happened under Donald Trump's watch.**

**Now Donald Trump and his family -- the epitome of tone-deaf, self-absorbed, out-of-touch elitism -- have faked a ludicrous victory lap, trying to pull the wool over our eyes, as if their unmistakable record of widespread disease, record job losses, lies, and corruption can be erased by four nights of taxpayer-funded pageantry.**

_It's a truly ridiculous spectacle, friend -- and that's not just the opinion of Democrats. I've spoken with many Republican voters who feel the same way._

This President is a failure. He has failed in his basic responsibility to protect the American people. His enablers in Congress, so fearful of losing re-election, have been too busy paying tribute to the Trump Family to stand up for the rest of us.

We need a clean sweep in November. And we need to defeat Trump's "favorite Senator" David Perdue in a landslide.

**[Friend, I need your help to mobilize record turnout in Georgia. This race is tied. It's a toss-up. Show Donald Trump and Senator David Perdue how you feel about their ridiculous convention. Chip in now:](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24ae/5b2c1286/3fdf7a6c/25f01a28/3592759828/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_27_gop_con?refcode=em_2020_08_27_gop_con")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Friend, this isn't us | Friend, 180,000 Americans are dead. Tens of millions have lost their jobs. Emergency unemployment insurance has run out. Emergency small business loans have stopped. Banks and landlords are threatening foreclosure and eviction. And it all happened under Donald Trump's watch. Now Donald Trump and his family -- the epitome of tone-deaf, self-absorbed, out-of-touch elitism -- have faked a ludicrous victory lap, trying to pull the wool over our eyes, as if their unmistakable record of widespread disease, record job losses, lies, and corruption can be erased by four nights of taxpayer-funded pageantry. It's a truly ridiculous spectacle, friend -- and that's not just the opinion of Democrats. I've spoken with many Republican voters who feel the same way. This President is a failure. He has failed in his basic responsibility to protect the American people. His enablers in Congress, so fearful of losing re-election, have been too busy paying tribute to the Trump Family to stand up for the rest of us. We need a clean sweep in November. And we need to defeat Trump's "favorite Senator" David Perdue in a landslide. name: Joe Biden
subject: Peter, we need to send a loud and clear message tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Trump we saw tonight is the same one we've seen for four years now. |
---

Peter,

Donald Trump just delivered a dark, angry speech to wrap up a dark, angry Republican Convention.

As I've said many times, this campaign is a battle for the soul of America. And President Trump just reminded us of what our nation will face if we lose.

**Peter, I 'm reaching out to you tonight because I flatly reject Trump's vision of a divided nation, governed by fear and hatred.** That's not who we are, and it's something we can never allow ourselves to become.

We're Americans, Peter: tough, resilient, and always full of hope. And united, there is nothing we can't achieve -- and that includes winning this election, lifting the cloak of darkness that Trump has dropped over our nation, and building a better future for ourselves, our families, and our children.

We can do it, but we have to do it together. [So if you can afford it, I'm asking you to please chip in $25 or whatever you can spare right now to help us win this life-changing election.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

**Any amount will make a difference, and send a loud and clear message that the American people won 't stand for the malarkey we saw from Trump and his convention all week:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $50 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $100 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $500 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=500&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")** The Trump we saw tonight is the same one we've seen for four years now: a president who takes no responsibility, refuses to lead, blames others, and will always choose himself over you and your family.

You and I both know that we deserve better, Peter.

We deserve a future where everyone in this country gets a fair shot, not just the privileged few at the top. Where everyone can get good health care, instead of worrying about going back to the bad old days where you could be denied coverage because of a preexisting condition. Where we deal with climate change, and treat it like the opportunity it is to lead the world in clean energy and create millions of new good-paying jobs in the process.

As President, with Vice President Kamala Harris and millions of grassroots supporters like you by my side, I am committed to making that future a reality.

[So if you're ready to turn the page on Donald Trump's chapter in history and start something better, then I hope you'll chip in your first $25 or whatever you can afford tonight to help power our campaign to victory. I know this campaign asks for a lot from you, but it would really make a difference at this pivotal moment.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B5_jrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks so much for everything you do, Peter. It really matters -- and I'm so proud to have you on my team.

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a3b/1229298822/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a3a/1229298822/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a39/1229298822/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a38/1229298822/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a37/1229298822/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a36/1229298822/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a35/1229298822/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a34/1229298822/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a33/1229298822/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a32/1229298822/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a35/1229298822/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a31/1229298822/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a34/1229298822/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b04e/1cd0ac28/151c096bd/357f6a30/1229298822/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Joe
subject: Cresco: Take action this weekend to help elect Joe and Kamala!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Team Biden-Harris Events Near You! |
---

Peter -- we only have 67 days until Election Day!

America cannot survive another four years under the current administration. We need your help to get Joe and Kamala elected! Attend a virtual event this weekend near Cresco to help us reach more voters in your community.

[Peter, there's a grassroots online event with folks from your community happening soon. Can we count on you to be there? Check out the details and RSVP now: ](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) [](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [**WHAT: **North Pocono, Dunmore and Moscow - Daily Phone Bank!
**WHEN:** Monday, August 31st, 2020
**TIME:** 1:00 pm EDT
**WHERE:** Online!](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac)
---
| [**RSVP now >>**](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.28_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac)
---
When we say our grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you, we really mean it, Peter.

Thanks for being in this fight!

Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea9/1641991042/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea8/1641991042/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea7/1641991042/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea6/1641991042/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea5/1641991042/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea4/1641991042/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea3/1641991042/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea2/1641991042/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea1/1641991042/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea0/1641991042/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea3/1641991042/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6e9f/1641991042/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6ea2/1641991042/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b039/1cd0ac28/15191a59e/357f6e9e/1641991042/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

| | | Friend, _First of all, I want to thank my amazing supporters, generous donors, tireless volunteers, the Republican Party, and my relentlessly positive 5 year old, who stood by my side over the last year and a half of campaigning. _ Following our Republican Convention, I have been working together with other Seventh District conservatives to make sure we have the best possible shot to take down Abigail Spanberger on Election Day, but today, _**I have a personal request**_ : **Team Ramirez is working on closing the books on our primary campaign as quickly as possible, and anything you can contribute today to help offset my last remaining expenses would be greatly appreciated**. [**Please consider making a contribution today of $25, $250 -- even the FEC maximum of $2800 -- or any other amount you feel comfortable with. You can _CLICK HERE_ to contribute**.](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkurdlkk-udthdyhkil-d/) _I am proud of our campaign_. We did amazing things, _and I couldn't have done it without you_. Together let’s work on changing the party for the better, changing the country for the better, and fighting for our conservative values we hold dear. __**God Bless!**__ \-- Tina

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Friend, First of all, I want to thank my amazing supporters, generous donors, tireless volunteers, the Republican Party, and my relentlessly positive 5 year old, who stood by my side over the last year and a half of campaigning. Following our Republican Convention, I have been working together with other Seventh District conservatives to make sure we have the best possible shot to take down Abigail Spanberger on Election Day, but today, I have a personal request : Team Ramirez is working on closing the books on our primary campaign as quickly as possible, and anything you can contribute today to help offset my last remaining expenses would be greatly appreciated. I am proud of our campaign. We did amazing things, and I couldn't have done it without you. Together let’s work on changing the party for the better, changing the country for the better, and fighting for our conservative values we hold dear. God Bless! \-- Tina | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | |

We’ve never been able to trust what the Fake News media says, and we’re not about to start now.

To get the TRUTH about what real AMERICANS thought, we just launched our Official 2020 GOP Convention Approval Poll and President Trump has requested that we personally reach out to YOU to get input on what REAL Americans are thinking.

We’re only reaching out to a small group of the President’s TOP supporters with this request. Your response will represent every Patriot in your zip code.

I also wanted to let you know that your contributions allowed us to put our first biographical ad on television, so we can tell folks across the 6th District who we are, and so we have a chance to define ourselves before the attack ads come pouring in and telling a false narrative. body:
|
#
Hello, When Jeff Van Drew switched parties and pledged his “undying support” to Donald Trump in January, he turned his back on South Jersey. **And last night at the Republican National Convention, Congressman Jeff Van Drew made it clear he’s only interested in serving himself.** South Jersey deserves better than someone who would put their political career ahead of their own constituents. I’m running for Congress to fight for the people of South Jersey and fight for what’s right. But I can’t do it alone. body:
The Trump Administration is sabotaging the United States Postal Service because it's politically expedient. _Not on my watch._
[**Help me fight on behalf of working people across the country | Make a Donation >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XFJGgpafJ_ex2YYUArd1B1nIovO0nOYxU5vJAx2RQ=/8Ut7skqkmBkrvjkf_EMn44AMhI9EqDpAwytuOaLVQUY=?refcode=X_082820_EOM_C)
With more Americans voting by mail this year than ever before, we need a functioning Postal Service to ensure a **safe** and **secure** election.
That's why, last week, I proudly voted in favor of the _Delivering for America Act_ , which provides the USPS with critical funding and resumes normal postal operations following nationwide delays. I'm pleased to report that the bill passed the House with bipartisan support.
When it comes to my work in Congress, I will **always **put the hard-working families of CA-38 first. This community means everything to me, which is why I'm excited to announce that one week ago today, I officially launched my re-election campaign!
**With Election Day around the corner, your support will help me reach the CA-38 voters who will decide this election.[Will you help me out by making a donation today? Even $1 will make a difference!](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XFJGgpafJ_ex2YYUArd1B1nIovO0nOYxU5vJAx2RQ=/BBCe97zem1efi4tSeG4WycleLzIlMPHDaC-HaGF8ZgI=?refcode=X_082820_EOM_C)**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: New Civil War?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_civil_war&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Let me speak from the heart. I'm sure you are experiencing some of the same feelings.** The future of our country and state seems quite dark right now. We are witnessing blood in our cities, lawlessness creeping into the suburbs and we still have authoritarian politicians abusing their emergency powers in the name of the "public health." We are approaching two weeks now since a DFL endorsed legislative candidate stood in the street of a quiet neighborhood in Hugo and made terroristic threats to the community. And he remains endorsed by the DFL, including Governor Tim Walz. It's obvious to all of us that BLM/Antifa are up to no good, yet this fringe leftist movement is praised by Democratic leadership, Hollywood, professional athletes and their indiscretions are ignored by our lazy, biased media. **BLM/Antifa is NOT a peaceful political movement seeking legislative change. They want compliance to their will. Disagree with them, and you will be labeled a racist, Nazi or fascist. Confront them and violence will ensue.** Do they ever look in the mirror? As anyone could imagine, people are starting to get sick of the lawlessness and name calling; the businesses being looted and innocent people being assaulted regularly. And so we are seeing the early stages of the inevitable retaliation from regular citizens. The last 48 hours in Kenosha is a sample of what is going to occur around the country. Are we witnessing the beginning of a new civil war? November's election is clearly turning in favor of Republicans as the electorate sees the radicalization of the Democrat Party in real time. But after watching the cowardice of a Republican state senator in the Hugo area last weekend, the election is clearly not going to solve all these problems. **One thing is crystal clear: we must remain connected as patriots in this state, unified in resisting the deterioration of our laws by thugs and racist agitators. And we must stand united against Governor Walz' assault on our civil rights and businesses.** Action 4 Liberty will remain vigilant, committed to fighting for you and your children's liberties whether we're in the midst of an outbreak in violence or politicians are attacking our rights at the Capitol. Our board, staff and team of volunteers take this mission seriously. We recognize the need to lead as our traditional institutions continue letting us down. We are approaching the end of August...168 days of this "emergency". Stand shoulder to shoulder with us in this important fight. It's time we stand up and defend our state and our American ideals. clean_body: | Peter \-- Let me speak from the heart. I'm sure you are experiencing some of the same feelings. The future of our country and state seems quite dark right now. We are witnessing blood in our cities, lawlessness creeping into the suburbs and we still have authoritarian politicians abusing their emergency powers in the name of the "public health." We are approaching two weeks now since a DFL endorsed legislative candidate stood in the street of a quiet neighborhood in Hugo and made terroristic threats to the community. And he remains endorsed by the DFL, including Governor Tim Walz. It's obvious to all of us that BLM/Antifa are up to no good, yet this fringe leftist movement is praised by Democratic leadership, Hollywood, professional athletes and their indiscretions are ignored by our lazy, biased media. BLM/Antifa is NOT a peaceful political movement seeking legislative change. They want compliance to their will. Disagree with them, and you will be labeled a racist, Nazi or fascist. Confront them and violence will ensue. Do they ever look in the mirror? As anyone could imagine, people are starting to get sick of the lawlessness and name calling; the businesses being looted and innocent people being assaulted regularly. And so we are seeing the early stages of the inevitable retaliation from regular citizens. The last 48 hours in Kenosha is a sample of what is going to occur around the country. Are we witnessing the beginning of a new civil war? November's election is clearly turning in favor of Republicans as the electorate sees the radicalization of the Democrat Party in real time. But after watching the cowardice of a Republican state senator in the Hugo area last weekend, the election is clearly not going to solve all these problems. One thing is crystal clear: we must remain connected as patriots in this state, unified in resisting the deterioration of our laws by thugs and racist agitators. And we must stand united against Governor Walz' assault on our civil rights and businesses. Action 4 Liberty will remain vigilant, committed to fighting for you and your children's liberties whether we're in the midst of an outbreak in violence or politicians are attacking our rights at the Capitol. Our board, staff and team of volunteers take this mission seriously. We recognize the need to lead as our traditional institutions continue letting us down. We are approaching the end of August...168 days of this "emergency". Stand shoulder to shoulder with us in this important fight. It's time we stand up and defend our state and our American ideals. Stay connected with what we are doing by visiting or connecting with us on our . In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty Action 4 Liberty · United States

body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58c35cc087b1535e/126341d77ccb41d4c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

Did you hear about the anarchy in Washington following President Trump's RNC speech?

The radical left decided to riot... and ATTACKED Sen. Rand Paul in the streets.

It's hard to believe that they had the nerve to attack a sitting Senator, but you can see for yourself! [_**Watch the video here**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58c35cc087b1535e/b73218661c3a4731c3d6b838967d376c/33153).
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58c35cc087b1535e/0657bf11b1d051c5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Sen. Rand Paul ATTACKED! Click to Watch. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58c35cc087b1535e/83ec1b8aa47ff346c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Minneapolis. Portland. Seattle. Washington. How long will the radical left continue to support rioters burning cities to the ground?

Defunding the police is the LAST thing our communities need right now. They need security, protection, and safety. Not lawlessness and crime.

Friend,

President Trump is hosting an important outdoor rally in Londonderry tonight. Here’s what you need to know:
|
---
_**Who: President Donald J. Trump**_
_**What: Keep New Hampshire Great Rally**_
_**Where: ProStar Aviation in Londonderry, NH**_
_**When: 6:00pm EST**_
|

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Which America is yours?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, There were two different scenes playing out in Washington DC last night.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=272A454A1A5923)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

There were two different scenes playing out in Washington DC last night.

---
| | At the White House

---
| | President Trump accepted the Republican nomination for President with a message of hope and security.

---
| | Outside

---
| | Radicals took to the streets, threatening violence and besieging police officers.

---
| | At the White House

---
| | President Trump closed the RNC Convention after four days of inspirational stories of leadership, second chances, and a vision for the future to help rebuild our economy.

---
| | Outside

---
| | Joe Biden supporters attacked seniors, veterans, and elected leaders who were walking home.

---
| | At the White House

---
| | President Trump laid out an agenda to put America first, create jobs, and ensure safety and prosperity.

---
| | Outside

---
| | The liberals who want to defund the police gave us a glimpse into the bleak future they are working to create.

---
| | |
---
| | [ PRESERVE THE AMERICAN DREAM → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=272A454A1A5924)
---
| | |
---
| | I’m running for Congress to make sure that our message of safe neighborhoods, good paying jobs, and a strong America that was coming from within the White House is the future that we work towards. And that the politicians and radical rioters who are hurting our communities and standing in the way of that prosperity see there is no place for their destruction and violence.

[FRIEND, Here is how WE win. We don’t start fires, we don’t break windows, and we don’t attack police officers - we get our message out to the voters. Let’s do it, together, and let’s win. Join now.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=272A454A1A5925)

---

subject: re: Join Us Tonight with a GOTV Virtual Rally for Senator Ed Markey!
body:
Join Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, Cori Bush, and our own, Roza Calderon for the kick-off! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=4b72edbcce&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## **CORI BUSH JOINS THE KICK-OFF GOTV RALLY TONIGHT!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9ee7d9c87e&e=66979298f9)
---
| _We are kicking off our Weekend of Action for Senator Ed Markey with an Amazing Roundtable of Progressive Champions!_
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b15e9d7104&e=66979298f9 "RSVP HERE")
---
| **Join Ed Markey, Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, Future Generations candidate and soon-to-be MO-01 Congresswoman, Cori Bush, and our own Future Generations Executive Director, Roza Calderón for a virtual rally on Zoom to get out the vote for Ed ahead of the Massachusetts primary!**

We'll hear from top progressive champions, and learn about Ed's vision to move us out of this crisis moment, as well as how you can get involved with Get Out the Vote efforts during this critical home stretch.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=687e6ff80e&e=66979298f9)
---
[ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=250d837494&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| [SIGN UP TO TEXT](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0cf9eb2cf7&e=66979298f9 "SIGN UP TO TEXT")
---
| [SIGN UP TO CALL](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=5100c59853&e=66979298f9 "SIGN UP TO CALL")
---
| [START MAKING CALLS NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0b55abf3ec&e=66979298f9 "START MAKING CALLS NOW!")
---
|
---
|
#### **Senator Ed Markey **is up for re-election and as the co-author of the Green New Deal, he's being challenged.
It's not a secret, Senator Ed Markey placed a huge target on his back the second he co-authored the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. While the nation celebrated such a bold climate and economic proposal, others, like Joe Kennedy III, felt that challenging Senator Markey was the only way to protect his $1.75 million dollars worth of oil stocks with Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Schlumberger.

Needless to say, dark money is pouring into this race fast, and we must fight back. Sign up to make calls to re-elect Ed and give the GND a fair shot!
---
| [TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=4c37fc8e24&e=66979298f9 "TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.** **
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=29bcef7375&e=66979298f9)
---
| The coronavirus pandemic has really changed the way we do politics. Our organization stretches every penny that is donated to keep our operations going and provide the best support to our amazing candidates. From text banking, door hangers, and safety equipment for our team, we count entirely on grassroots donations because we are powered by the People.

_We are youth-founded, organized, and led. We volunteer all of our time to fight for future generations. We thank you for your support._

**With just one week before the September 1st Massachusetts Primary, can you commit to $15 a month until we win in November?**
---
| [Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a711916d86&e=66979298f9 "Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations")
---
|
---
|
### A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
We've come a long way! When we founded Future Generations we knew it would be difficult to get going in a sea of organizations. But we set out to be different. We set out to support candidates and incumbents who think not just of making a name for themselves with today's hot topics, but those who truly care about the world we are building for Future Generations to come. While you scroll through this email, I'd like you to ask yourself, "What is the legacy we'll leave behind?"

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director
[Chiara](mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earth)[@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---

name: Team Siegel
subject: The attacks are flooding in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
|
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: unfinished business.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We cannot afford to fall short when our August end-of-month deadline comes on Monday. |
---

Peter,

Last weekend, I emailed you with a clear message that I wasn't worried about the Republican National Convention.

Frankly, I was right. Over the course of four days, they failed to offer a path forward for our country. They didn't even have a policy platform.

[Their only agenda is walking in lockstep behind Donald Trump. That's not a vision for our country. It's blindness.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

But, if there's one thing we know about Trump and Republicans, it's that even if he is completely inept at leading our country, they can still rake in money. And I'm sure he got a big fundraising boost this week during his convention.

Now Peter, we have to keep pace with their fundraising, because every dollar that each of our campaigns raise is another undecided voter who we are able to reach with our message. **And Monday marks our first public filing deadline as a full ticket.**

When fundraising numbers are made public next month, it will be clear who is in stronger standing coming out of their convention: Joe and me or Donald Trump and Mike Pence. So we cannot afford to fall short when our August end-of-month deadline comes on Monday.

[So, I have an important question to ask you. If you're as determined as I am to reach and mobilize every voter that we possibly can, will you chip in $25 to go towards our critical first end-of-month goal as a ticket?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

There's a lot of unfinished business to be taken care of in the next 67 days to win this election, and your contributions today are going to make sure we have the resources to get it done.

Thanks for being on the team -- Joe and I are counting on you!

Kamala Harris
**\---Forwarded Message---**
**From:** Kamala Harris
**Date:** Wed, Aug 23, 2020
**Subject line:** I'm not worried about the Republican convention, Peter
**To:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
Peter, I'm not worried about the Republican convention this week. But I am worried about the kind of money they are going to raise.

We already know these folks' M.O. They're going to tell lie after lie and try to scare the American people into voting for four more years of their hateful and divisive agenda.

It couldn't be more different from the convention we watched this week, where we laid out our plan for a future that includes everyone, not just the people on our side of the aisle.

**Peter, I'll let you decide whether or not to tune in, but before you go today, I have a favor to ask you.**

Donald Trump and the Republicans are going to raise a whole lot of money off of their fear mongering this upcoming week, so we're relaunching our Beat Trump Fund to make sure our message of hope and unity reaches voters across the country.

Our goal is 500,000 online donations before Trump takes the stage on Thursday night. It's ambitious, but we can reach it if everyone does their part.

[Peter, if you can spare $25 today, will you pitch in to hit this goal and help us share our vision of a better America with more voters? ](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

clean_body: We cannot afford to fall short when our August end-of-month deadline comes on Monday. | Peter, Last weekend, I emailed you with a clear message that I wasn't worried about the Republican National Convention. Frankly, I was right. Over the course of four days, they failed to offer a path forward for our country. They didn't even have a policy platform. "" But, if there's one thing we know about Trump and Republicans, it's that even if he is completely inept at leading our country, they can still rake in money. And I'm sure he got a big fundraising boost this week during his convention. Now Peter, we have to keep pace with their fundraising, because every dollar that each of our campaigns raise is another undecided voter who we are able to reach with our message. And Monday marks our first public filing deadline as a full ticket. When fundraising numbers are made public next month, it will be clear who is in stronger standing coming out of their convention: Joe and me or Donald Trump and Mike Pence. So we cannot afford to fall short when our August end-of-month deadline comes on Monday. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" There's a lot of unfinished business to be taken care of in the next 67 days to win this election, and your contributions today are going to make sure we have the resources to get it done. Thanks for being on the team -- Joe and I are counting on you! Kamala Harris \---Forwarded Message--- From: Kamala Harris Date: Wed, Aug 23, 2020 Subject line: I'm not worried about the Republican convention, Peter To: "" Peter, I'm not worried about the Republican convention this week. But I am worried about the kind of money they are going to raise. We already know these folks' M.O. They're going to tell lie after lie and try to scare the American people into voting for four more years of their hateful and divisive agenda. It couldn't be more different from the convention we watched this week, where we laid out our plan for a future that includes everyone, not just the people on our side of the aisle. Peter, I'll let you decide whether or not to tune in, but before you go today, I have a favor to ask you. Donald Trump and the Republicans are going to raise a whole lot of money off of their fear mongering this upcoming week, so we're relaunching our Beat Trump Fund to make sure our message of hope and unity reaches voters across the country. Our goal is 500,000 online donations before Trump takes the stage on Thursday night. It's ambitious, but we can reach it if everyone does their part. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for believing in our vision. I'm grateful to stand with you in this fight for the America we know is possible. For The People, Kamala Harris | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

| Friend,

I’ve given my all to this country -- first as an Iraq war Veteran, then as a Congresswoman, and now as one of the first Asian-American women to serve in the United States Senate.

**I know what it takes to serve our communities and our nation, friend.**

And I know that Sri Preston Kulkarni, with his lifetime of public service and his dedication to the working families of Texas, has what it takes.

Sri is a fighter for working families whose own deeply personal experience with our broken health care system has guided his fight for systemic change. After his father was diagnosed with cancer, Sri dropped out of school to care for him -- and the bills from his care nearly bankrupted his family. Sri knows that this is a story shared by millions of Americans, and **he’s running to make sure it never happens again.**

After returning to school, graduating, and receiving his Master’s degree, Sri went on to become a diplomat, promoting American values all around the world, including places like Russia, China and Iran.

**Sri knows firsthand what America’s global standing means for the future of democracies around the world, and he can help restore our global standing and ensure America leads on diplomacy once again.**

Now, he’s running for Congress in the midst of a pandemic that has decimated jobs around the country and left families all across Texas struggling. More than ever, Texas families need leaders who are ready to champion their cause, fight for an economic recovery that puts them first and ensure that our government finally works for the people.

clean_body: = | Friend, I’ve given my all to this country -- first as an Iraq war Veteran, then as a Congresswoman, and now as one of the first Asian-American women to serve in the United States Senate. I know what it takes to serve our communities and our nation, friend. And I know that Sri Preston Kulkarni, with his lifetime of public service and his dedication to the working families of Texas, has what it takes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Sri is a fighter for working families whose own deeply personal experience with our broken health care system has guided his fight for systemic change. After his father was diagnosed with cancer, Sri dropped out of school to care for him -- and the bills from his care nearly bankrupted his family. Sri knows that this is a story shared by millions of Americans, and he’s running to make sure it never happens again. After returning to school, graduating, and receiving his Master’s degree, Sri went on to become a diplomat, promoting American values all around the world, including places like Russia, China and Iran. Sri knows firsthand what America’s global standing means for the future of democracies around the world, and he can help restore our global standing and ensure America leads on diplomacy once again. name: Jessica Morse
subject: The Future is up to Us
body:
| | | |
---
Friends,
You know what’s at stake. In California we are exhausted by wildfires stoked by climate change. But when we had 240,000 people evacuated and 700 fires burning, the President slow-rolled our aid and told us to “sweep the forest floors.”
One of the largest storms in history devastated the American South this week. Deadly racism, police brutality, and vigilantism go unchecked. There are over 1,000 deaths a day from a pandemic with no end in sight. But last night, the President stood, with the White House as his political backdrop, and declared victory.

But when we had 240,000 people evacuated and 700 fires burning, the President slow-rolled our aid and told us to “sweep the forest floors.” One of the largest storms in history devastated the American South this week. Deadly racism, police brutality, and vigilantism go unchecked. There are over 1,000 deaths a day from a pandemic with no end in sight. But last night, the President stood, with the White House as his political backdrop, and declared victory. We deserve leadership and solutions.**.** We must elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. We can’t allow Jackie Gordon to implement and inflict this radical agenda on Long Island. We must take a stand and fight for our community. That’s why I’ve called upon a coalition of dedicated Republicans who have agreed to do EXCLUSIVE 300% MATCHING for every donation. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The Pro-America RNC, a COVID survivor speaks out, Riots in the streets, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20241-2f40954200f74116a30fdcae3c56a1c4/77/864/a03d1d2b-17c8-4eb6-bad8-fc124007924c)** This week, in the midst of violent riots across many major Democrat-run cities, President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence accepted the Republican nomination for President and Vice President of the United States, at the Republican National Convention. The pro-America law and order ticket spent the week taking aim at the rhetoric and agenda pushed by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris at the Democratic National Convention. From the appeasement of violent rioters to the false premise that America is a “depraved” nation, to calls to defund the police; President Trump, Vice President Pence, and various other speakers took aim at the modern, radical Democratic Party platform. With ease, Vice President Pence dismantled Joe Biden’s doomsday rhetoric. First and foremost, he condemned and called for an end to the violence in many major Democrat-run cities from Portland to Minneapolis. He then took on Joe Biden’s assertion that, in terms of our continued coronavirus recovery, “no miracle is coming.” Vice President Pence rebuked Joe Biden’s lack of faith in our great nation saying that, “what Joe Biden doesn't understand is that America is a nation of miracles.” President Trump ended the fourth night by accepting the Republican Nomination for President of the United States. The President made his administration’s stance on our nation clear: “Where Joe Biden sees American darkness, we see American greatness.” Further noting that “America is not a land cloaked in darkness, America is the torch that lights the entire world.” He then went on to attack the Democrats’ appeasement of violent riots and looting saying, “How can the Democrat Party ask to lead our country, when it spends so much time tearing down our country?” He then offered a brilliant juxtaposition of his agenda versus Joe Biden’s agenda, saying that Joe Biden’s agenda is made in China, but his agenda is made in the USA. President Trump and Vice President Pence were not the only great speakers to grace the Republican National Convention stage. From Ann Dorn, wife of fallen-Police Captain David Dorn, to Nick Sandmann, to Herschel Walker, and many more — speakers from across our great nation rallied to show their support for President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence. From speeches attacking Biden’s agenda to speeches highlighting the devastation caused by incompetent Democrat “leadership,” and stories of hope and love for America, they gave incredibly moving speeches that won’t soon be forgotten. Now that both President Trump and Joe Biden have accepted their respective nominations for President of the United States, what comes next? Debates... that is, if Joe Biden doesn’t back out at the last minute. | |
---

Across the country, we have been in varying degrees of lockdowns since the middle of March. The results have been devastating for our economy, for our constitutional rights and for our children’s education. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQxLTJmNDA5NTQyMDBmNzQxMTZhMzBmZGNhZTNjNTZhMWM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2ltcGVyYXRpdmUtcmVvcGVuLWFtZXJpY2EvP21pZD00MjU4NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=8ZyOnz4gnJ50Ml7Co0XPcQ)**
|
---
Riots and looting continued to plague Democrat-run cities across our nation this week. The hardest-hit city, other than Portland, Oregon, was Kenosha, Wisconsin.

The riots followed the shooting of a young man, armed with a knife, by local police, following a 911 call from his girlfriend, and his refusal to comply with officers that arrived on the scene. The young man, identified as Jacob Blake, was reportedly paralyzed as a result of the shooting.

After videos and details of the incident were made public, the city was thrown into unrest by violent riots and the incineration of many major buildings. Despite the fact that no determination on the justification of the shooting has been made, rioters immediately denounced the shooting as unjustified and began to burn down the city.

This kind of violence and chaos has spread to Democrat-run cities across the nation for over three months now.

At first, Joe Biden fanned the flames of the riots, before offering an objectively weak condemnation of violence. President Trump, on the other hand, immediately condemned the violent riots and offered immediate federal support, if cities would just make the official request necessary. Not shockingly though, instead of working with the President, local Democrat leaders were content with watching their cities burn.

In the midst of political conventions and civil unrest, negotiations on what is believed to be the final coronavirus stimulus package are still happening.

And when Nancy Pelosi isn’t refusing to condemn violent riots, she has been making entirely unreasonable demands regarding the next stimulus package.

Our Honorary Chairman [Jenny Beth Martin took issue with Speaker Pelosi’s demands](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQxLTJmNDA5NTQyMDBmNzQxMTZhMzBmZGNhZTNjNTZhMWM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9uLW5ld3MvdHBwLWFjdGlvbi1yZWFjdHMtdG8tc3RpbXVsdXMtYmlsbC1uZWdvdGlhdGlvbnMvP21pZD00MjU4NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Cmh1LBYUi1KaM7NrMpoVgQ), saying:

_“Speaker Pelosi thinks she’s standing on firm ground with her oh-so-reasonable ‘let’s split the difference’ strategy. Sure, of course, it seems perfectly reasonable to meet in the middle — except that it’s not, because the high end the Democrats set is ridiculous to begin with. Under her thinking, if the House Democrats had passed a bill spending $10 trillion, and the Senate Republicans had set a floor of $1 trillion, ‘meeting in the middle’ would have set the spending level at $5.5 trillion. That’s just absurd._

_At some point, she’s got to recognize this is real money we’re talking about. It doesn’t grow on trees, and our children are going to have to repay this debt — or suffer the consequences.”_

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQxLTJmNDA5NTQyMDBmNzQxMTZhMzBmZGNhZTNjNTZhMWM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2Nubi1sYWJlbHMta2Vub3NoYS1tb3N0bHktcGVhY2VmdWwtd2hpbGUtaW5mZXJuby1yYWdlcy1vbnNjcmVlbi8_bWlkPTQyNTg3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=tQF0_iL6Cwbp5m_FNSf5sQ)

clean_body: This week, in the midst of violent riots across many major Democrat-run cities, President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence accepted the Republican nomination for President and Vice President of the United States, at the Republican National Convention. The pro-America law and order ticket spent the week taking aim at the rhetoric and agenda pushed by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris at the Democratic National Convention. From the appeasement of violent rioters to the false premise that America is a “depraved” nation, to calls to defund the police; President Trump, Vice President Pence, and various other speakers took aim at the modern, radical Democratic Party platform. With ease, Vice President Pence dismantled Joe Biden’s doomsday rhetoric. First and foremost, he condemned and called for an end to the violence in many major Democrat-run cities from Portland to Minneapolis. He then took on Joe Biden’s assertion that, in terms of our continued coronavirus recovery, “no miracle is coming.” Vice President Pence rebuked Joe Biden’s lack of faith in our great nation saying that, “what Joe Biden doesn't understand is that America is a nation of miracles.” President Trump ended the fourth night by accepting the Republican Nomination for President of the United States. The President made his administration’s stance on our nation clear: “Where Joe Biden sees American darkness, we see American greatness.” Further noting that “America is not a land cloaked in darkness, America is the torch that lights the entire world.” He then went on to attack the Democrats’ appeasement of violent riots and looting saying, “How can the Democrat Party ask to lead our country, when it spends so much time tearing down our country?” He then offered a brilliant juxtaposition of his agenda versus Joe Biden’s agenda, saying that Joe Biden’s agenda is made in China, but his agenda is made in the USA. President Trump and Vice President Pence were not the only great speakers to grace the Republican National Convention stage. From Ann Dorn, wife of fallen-Police Captain David Dorn, to Nick Sandmann, to Herschel Walker, and many more — speakers from across our great nation rallied to show their support for President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence. From speeches attacking Biden’s agenda to speeches highlighting the devastation caused by incompetent Democrat “leadership,” and stories of hope and love for America, they gave incredibly moving speeches that won’t soon be forgotten. Now that both President Trump and Joe Biden have accepted their respective nominations for President of the United States, what comes next? Debates... that is, if Joe Biden doesn’t back out at the last minute. | | The state of Minnesota has been a Democratic stronghold for decades, but one curiosity out of the Gopher State hasn’t escaped the notice of political observers:... | Across the country, we have been in varying degrees of lockdowns since the middle of March. The results have been devastating for our economy, for our constitutional rights and for our children’s education. | Riots and looting continued to plague Democrat-run cities across our nation this week. The hardest-hit city, other than Portland, Oregon, was Kenosha, Wisconsin. The riots followed the shooting of a young man, armed with a knife, by local police, following a 911 call from his girlfriend, and his refusal to comply with officers that arrived on the scene. The young man, identified as Jacob Blake, was reportedly paralyzed as a result of the shooting. After videos and details of the incident were made public, the city was thrown into unrest by violent riots and the incineration of many major buildings. Despite the fact that no determination on the justification of the shooting has been made, rioters immediately denounced the shooting as unjustified and began to burn down the city. This kind of violence and chaos has spread to Democrat-run cities across the nation for over three months now. At first, Joe Biden fanned the flames of the riots, before offering an objectively weak condemnation of violence. President Trump, on the other hand, immediately condemned the violent riots and offered immediate federal support, if cities would just make the official request necessary. Not shockingly though, instead of working with the President, local Democrat leaders were content with watching their cities burn. | Paul Luman never thought COVID could impact him as severely as it did until he found himself fighting for his life and looking for a miracle. | Video footage from Daily Caller reporter Phillip Nieto captured the protesters’ threat. | In the midst of political conventions and civil unrest, negotiations on what is believed to be the final coronavirus stimulus package are still happening. And when Nancy Pelosi isn’t refusing to condemn violent riots, she has been making entirely unreasonable demands regarding the next stimulus package. Our Honorary Chairman , saying: “Speaker Pelosi thinks she’s standing on firm ground with her oh-so-reasonable ‘let’s split the difference’ strategy. Sure, of course, it seems perfectly reasonable to meet in the middle — except that it’s not, because the high end the Democrats set is ridiculous to begin with. Under her thinking, if the House Democrats had passed a bill spending $10 trillion, and the Senate Republicans had set a floor of $1 trillion, ‘meeting in the middle’ would have set the spending level at $5.5 trillion. That’s just absurd. At some point, she’s got to recognize this is real money we’re talking about. It doesn’t grow on trees, and our children are going to have to repay this debt — or suffer the consequences.” After CNN showed footage of Kenosha, Wisconsin, burning while an on-screen chyron called the rioting there “mostly peaceful,” the responses on Twitter were mostly snarky. | At irreconcilable odds with their progressive counterparts at every turn this election cycle, conservatives are standing once again with feet planted firmly on the pro-life platform. | |

name: Team Stanton
subject: Don't Let Up—The US Postal Service Still Needs Your Support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**[Will you sign on to this petition calling on the United States Postal Service to be protected from measures implemented by the Trump administration?](https://act.myngp.com/el/_LbbPv6vXHyNmPpOidp_cV_2GYMydhwIP0AZgVSMlwg=/EhND41aolA0reIwjQzOnfht9eislwFUvzmdJpkTvZmw=)**

The USPS is a vital service that is critical for our daily lives. Millons of Americans receive their medications, pay taxes, and are sent paychecks through the mail. Given the current crisis, access to vote-by-mail is now more important than ever. Forcing people to vote in person is not only to inconvenient for seniors, people with disabilities, or rural citizens, but it also is now hazardous to public health.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_LbbPv6vXHyNmPpOidp_cV_2GYMydhwIP0AZgVSMlwg=/EhND41aolA0reIwjQzOnfht9eislwFUvzmdJpkTvZmw=)

Last week, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy said that these measures would be suspended until after the election, but the work is not over. We need to make sure that the USPS has the resources necessary to serve America's needs and to ensure a fair election in November.

**[I hope you'll consider signing this petition, and chipping in to help candidates like me continue to fight for the institutions that actually make our country great, like the postal service!](https://act.myngp.com/el/_LbbPv6vXHyNmPpOidp_cV_2GYMydhwIP0AZgVSMlwg=/hABMkRkGtdheLgeYntrWwXRbaEGgqgCr5lbJxypnVbg=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_LbbPv6vXHyNmPpOidp_cV_2GYMydhwIP0AZgVSMlwg=/EhND41aolA0reIwjQzOnfht9eislwFUvzmdJpkTvZmw=)

Thank you for your support,

\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Team Inslee
subject: The RGA has money to burn.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is why this matters.
| Friend, Wanted to make sure you saw Jay's note -- and add this important context: Republicans are sitting on a war chest, waiting to spend it on a race like this one. Loren Culp is like Donald Trump in so many ways, from beliefs to bluster. The Republican Governors Association is having a record-breaking fundraising year, and they only have a handful of seats to flip this fall. They have money to burn on races they think they can win. Jay's is one of them. Do you remember how you felt in August 2016? So sure of the future because the alternative was impossible to comprehend? So wild, so crazy, there's no way it could happen -- _until it did._ We said in 2016 that we had to hold onto that feeling and use it in 2020. 2020 is here -- and we have Trump at the national level and a mini-Trump in Loren Culp in Washington state. We can't be blindsided again. **[Donate $5 or more right now before Monday's midnight end-of-month deadline -- the first public reporting deadline of the general election -- to help raise $40,000 to fight back and reelect Jay as governor of Washington.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10882?t=3&akid=8130%2E868730%2E-c-Aog)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10888?t=4&akid=8130%2E868730%2E-c-Aog)

From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thu, Aug 27, 2020
Subject: Who said it: Donald Trump or Loren Culp?
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=11&akid=8130%2E868730%2E-c-Aog)
Friend,
**Who said it: Donald Trump or my opponent, Loren Culp?**
→ He compared himself to Rosa Parks because he took on the "civil rights" of 2nd Amendment activists by refusing to enforce a law passed by a majority of voters.
→ He compared officers who did enforce that law to Nazi military officers.
→ He called the state-mandated mask requirement "unconstitutional and ridiculous."
The answer? Though these quotes sound as Trumpy as you can get, they were all said by my Republican opponent, Loren Culp.
The parallels don't stop there: Both Trump and Culp weren't taken seriously. Both went on to be the nominees for their party. One got elected in 2016 and the other might get elected in 2020._Unless we fight back._
**Coming up next week is our first end-of-month deadline since the general election officially began. So we set an aggressive end-of-month goal of raising $40,000 by midnight on Monday.[Will you donate $5 or more right now to fight back against this homegrown Trumpism and make sure we don't elect a mini-Trump this November?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10882?t=12&akid=8130%2E868730%2E-c-Aog)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10888?t=13&akid=8130%2E868730%2E-c-Aog)

I want to be clear about this threat. Republicans running for governor across the country are raking in huge campaign checks. The Republican Governors Association has millions to unleash against the few Democrats up for reelection this cycle. They only have four governorships to flip in 2020, and they have an unparalleled war chest at their disposal.
Washington voters start voting sooner than you'd expect. We must be ready for the attacks and even an "October surprise." We're running out of time, and we've seen what happens when we take a win for granted. We can't afford to do that here.
There's simply too much at stake. I hope you agree -- **[and I hope you'll make a donation today to fund the fight now through Election Day.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10882?t=19&akid=8130%2E868730%2E-c-Aog)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Help Us Stop Socialism NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
"Democratic" socialists are coming after the Senate with bundles of cash on hand. They are power hungry, Peter, “Democratic” socialists are coming after the Senate with bundles of cash on hand. **They are power hungry** , and they want to see America become a socialist nation. It is incumbent upon us, as American patriots, to __fight back_!_ With just a couple days left in August, _**we need all hands on deck**_ to save the Senate! body:

Friend,

David Perdue is in trouble -- and Mitch McConnell and the rest of the GOP know it.

**In a race that could decide control of the U.S. Senate, Jon Ossoff and David Perdue are neck and neck in the polls -- with some showing Jon leading.**

So McConnell is tapping into his network of dark money from right-wing special interest groups. He's funneling millions of dollars into Georgia in a desperate attempt to save his majority in the Senate.

**We can't let Mitch McConnell and David Perdue buy this election, friend.**
