name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What we saw this week at the Republican convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Before I ask if you can make a donation to support Warren Democrats right now, I'd just like to talk about what we saw at this week's Republican National Convention. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525068/45c30650/1c3ce1dc1/66e82020/3384404851/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Before I ask if you can make a donation to support Warren Democrats right now, I'd just like to talk about what we saw at this week's Republican National Convention.

We saw a president who has ignored science, fanned the flames of racism, shoveled trillions to giant corporations, and employed fascist tactics. And we saw a parade of so-called "leaders" who've stood by his side.

So we need to defeat Donald Trump this November, but that's not all. We need to sweep his Republican enablers out of office, too -- at every level of government.

That's why I've now endorsed over 100 Warren Democrats running up and down the ballot.

**From now through November 3, we need to do everything we can to not just win the White House, but also to take back the Senate, expand our House majority, flip state houses, and elect local leaders who will put people, not special interests, first.**

**[If you're able to make a donation to support our mission of electing bold reformers and making big, structural change, please chip in $2 or whatever you can right now. Monday is our next fundraising deadline, and your contribution would go a long way towards helping hit our goal.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525068/45c30650/1c3ce1dc1/66e82023/3384404851/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE2Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MjhfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU16F_EOM_EWD_E_20200828_V1S2_P")**

We all need to be in the fight to win big this November.

And after November, we all need to stay in the fight to get big things done.

We stay in this fight so that when our children and our grandchildren ask what we did during this dark chapter in our nation's history, we will be able to look them squarely in the eye and say: we organized, we persisted, and we changed America.

So I'm in this fight all the way. And however you're able to keep up the fight -- whether it's by pitching in a few hours a week as a volunteer, or by making sure your friends, family, and neighbors are all ready to vote safely, or by chipping in a few bucks, I'm deeply grateful.

[If making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, will you donate before Monday's end-of-month deadline to help hit this powerfully important August fundraising goal?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525068/45c30650/1c3ce1dc1/66e82023/3384404851/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE2Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MjhfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU16F_EOM_EWD_E_20200828_V1S2_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525068/45c30650/1c3ce1dc1/66e82023/3384404851/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE2Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MjhfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU16F_EOM_EWD_E_20200828_V1S2_P")
---

name: Team Joe
subject: It's not too late to make sure you're registered to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
With just 67 days left, we can't stop the momentum now. |
---

Hey Peter, Are you prepared to help elect Joe and Kamala as our next President and Vice President? With just 67 days left, we can't stop the momentum now. So, you've decided _who_ you're voting for, but do you know _when_ , _where_ , and _how_ you're voting? Team Joe is here to help. | | [CHECK MY VOTER REGISTRATION ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083e2/920111413/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://iwillvote.com?utm_source=email&utm_medium=iwillvote&partner_campaign=digi_engagement--20200828--jb_em_info_2020.08.28_b8_registertovote-_x__f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_term=national")
---
| [REGISTER TO VOTE ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083e2/920111413/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://iwillvote.com?utm_source=email&utm_medium=iwillvote&partner_campaign=digi_engagement--20200828--jb_em_info_2020.08.28_b8_registertovote-_x__f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_term=national")
---
We've seen how incredibly strong the spirit of Americans all over the country can be. People might be afraid -- but they're resilient and hopeful -- and one thing is clear: they're ready for real leadership.
There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines, so Peter, once you've registered to vote, reach out to your friends and family to make sure they're registered too. And then make a plan to vote, whether it's by mail, early in-person, or on Election Day.
| [MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083e1/920111413/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://iwillvote.com/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digi_engagement--20200828--jb_em_info_2020.08.28_b8_registertovote-_x__f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_term=national&utm_medium=email")
---
We're all in this together.
Team Joe

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083e0/920111413/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083df/920111413/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083de/920111413/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083dd/920111413/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083dc/920111413/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083db/920111413/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083da/920111413/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083d9/920111413/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083d8/920111413/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083d7/920111413/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083da/920111413/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083d6/920111413/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083d9/920111413/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b06b/1cd0ac28/152a1548f/357083d5/920111413/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
